channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Appeals court rejects Trump's bid to stop removal of his name from Kennedy Center
item.description: The D.C. Circuit denied all of President Trump's arguments to prevent the removal of his name from the arts institution.

item.title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal justices' additional income sources
item.description: Annual financial reports detail the justices' gifts, travel, and personal finances.

item.title: New U.S. passports featuring Trump's image are now available. Here's how to get or avoid one
item.description: The passports display an image of President Trump and are available only by appointment at the Washington Passport Agency.

item.title: Tensions with Iran add fresh uncertainty to an already shaky global economy
item.description: Crude oil prices rose and stocks fell after President Trump ended the ceasefire with Iran, adding new uncertainty to the global economy.
